raw_input:
[5.0/5] I am very happy that I was given a chance to try Luxy ... I have lost a considerable amount of weight throughout the years, because it was imperative for me to maintain a healthy weight due to the fact that I used to have full blown type 2 diabetes. With weight loss or weight gain comes stretch marks. I am very happy that I was given a chance to try Luxy Beauty Care's Stretch Mark Cream. I have been religiously using it on my thighs and I can honestly say that I am very happy with the results that I got. Two thumps up for this product!

I received one or more of the products mentioned above for review purposes. Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally and believe will be good for others. I’m just a regular consumer and I appreciate reading and giving honest feedback about products that regular people like me use on a daily basis or consider buying. My views and opinions are from a customer/end user’s standpoint. [5.0/5] Five Stars Thank you good price with high quality well that we will use [4.0/5] Overall Good Stretch Mark Cream I been using this stretch mark cream for several weeks now. I like that it smells really nice. Its also very moisturizing as well. I feel that its important to use a product to help prevent future stretch marks as well as fading old ones away. I was focusing on certain areas by my chest. As I am a very busty lady so you tend to get stress marks. I have noticed fading of stretch marks in those areas when using this product compared to other products I have used in the past. Over all I am pleased with the product. I have not had any skin reactions to the cream as well. Which is a huge plus. I received this product complementary in exchange for inspection and my honest opinion. All thoughts are my own, and results may vary. I was not obligated to leave a positive review. [4.0/5] It is a pretty thick cream so it hydrates the skin but it ... Luxy’s Stretch Mark Cream is specifically formulated to increase your skin's collagen and elastin production to help prevent and diminish the appearance of stretch marks. It is a pretty thick cream so it hydrates the skin but it is absorbed quickly. It’s free of harsh chemicals, which is good for my sensitive skin and it works on all skin types. There is no offensive menthol or eucalyptus scent, like many other stretch mark creams I have tried (I'm sure Dave appreciates that!)

I’ve been using for about a week and I think the cream does help reduce the appearance of stretch marks by giving the skin a more even tone; my stretch marks seem smoother. Suggested use is twice daily and for improved results, it is suggested to use with a derma roller. I have been using the derma roller with the cream and while I think it’s pretty impossible to rid yourself of the stretch marks, for me, anything that makes them less visible is great! I haven’t seen “wow” results yet, but a week is pretty early. I do see a difference, even if a little one so I’m curious to see what they will look like after I finish the bottle.

*Product received in exchange for review* [4.0/5] Works Best On Fine Lines or Marks I found this to do a nice job of smoothing the skin and minimizing some of the finer marks and flaws. It left the treated areas looking more universal as a whole, and the skin feeling more soft and smooth tho the touch. I could see a lessening or lightening of the color in some marks, but they did not all disappear. The marks that were recent, thin or fine to begin with seemed to do better with this cream than the ones that had been around longer or were larger in size.

This was easy to apply and didn't seem to leave much of a residue behind. It takes a bit more than some of the thinner creams I have tried, but applies more thickly and evenly too. I had no staining or damage to my clothing when using this either. There is a slight smell to this cream. It is a medicinal smell, almost minty to me but it is there.

*A sample item was provided for review purposes. [4.0/5] Four Stars Good [4.0/5] Great Product I Was Selected By Tomoson To Sample And Review Stretch Mark Cream By Luxy Beauty In Exchange For My Honest And Unbais Review Of This Product!
My Thoughts Of This Stretch Mark Cream Was Very Nice. It Has A Thick Goopy Texture That Absorbs Fairly Quickly. I Have Only Been Using This For About A Week Or So, But I Can See A Slight Difference. My Stretch Marks Are Lighter And I Do Feel That If I Keep Using This Bottle Till It's Empty That My Marks Will Be Barely Visible. The Cream Absorbs Into The Skin Quickly And Does Not Leave You Greasy Which I Love That It Has Alot Of Moisturizing Power Too. This Cream Is Reasonably Priced And It's Very Easy To Use.
Honestly I Have Not Heard Of This Company Before Getting The Chance To Review This Product Though Tomoson, But I Highly Recommend This Cream. Their Products Are Made In The USA.

The Ingredients In This Cream Is Deionized Water, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Shea butter ( Which I Love ), Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Stearic Acid, Organic Olive Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Cocoa Butter ( Another Butter My Skin Loves ) , Jojoba Oil, Mango Butter, Rose Hip Seed Oil, Grapefruit Seed Extract, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Panthenol, Potassium Sorbate, Orange Oil, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hydroxide.

Luxe Beauty Care Stretch Mark Cream Is An Anti-Stretch Mark Formulation That Helps Diminish The Appearance Of Old Stretch Marks And Prevents Occurrence Of New Ones. Suitable For Men/Women, It Contains Shea Butter, Cocoa Butter & Mango Butter Which My Skin Loves And Just Soaks Up. It's FDA Approved And Contains No Harsh Chemicals.

I Only Recommend Products Or Services I Use Personally And Believe Will Be Good For Others. I’m Just A Regular Consumer That Will Recommend Luxy Beauty Stretch Mark Cream To Others And I Appreciate Reading And Giving Honest Feedback About Many Products Just Like This One That Regular People Like Me Use On A Daily Basis Or Just Considering Buying. My Views And Opinions Are From A Customer/End User’s Standpoint. [4.0/5] Works Good For Minor Stretch Marks Because I am a plus size woman, naturally I have stretch marks on various areas of my body. I have been using this Stretch Mark Cream by Luxy Beauty Care for a couple of weeks now, and I have had some pretty decent results so far using this.

I have stretch marks on my stomach, upper arms and around my bust. The stretch marks on my arms and bust are fairly small in size and more minor than the ones on my stomach. I have found that this cream is working well for my arms and bust, I am seeing progress in their visibility. On my stomach, the ones that I call my tiger stripes, they are a bit more stubborn. I think that if I use this cream for a while, and keep up my routine, results will come. I do recommend for those stubborn stretch marks to exfoliate the area a few times a week. This method in combination with this stretch mark cream has been my best friend!

I give this 4 stars, it is a great product, and one that I definitely recommend giving a shot if you want to treat your stretch marks. However if you have the stubborn ones, this will work, but it goes a bit more on the slower side.

Please note that I was sent this product complimentary to try out in my home in order to share my honest experience, thoughts and review. [5.0/5] This product works GREAT! **Disclosure: I received the product mentioned below for free usingTomoson.com. However, all of the opinions expressed are my own.

As a mom of three, with a normal weight of 135 lbs, and am now down to 200 lbs. from 240 lbs., I have some stretch marks. I don't really care what others think of them, I have issues with weight, and I have 3 babies that I stretched that skin for. =) I do however, get annoyed by them, I care what I think of myself and how I appear. That is why A.) I am on a weight loss journey, and B.) I am on a stretch mark removal mission!

I want to say that I was very skeptical of a cream making these huge discolored stretch marks go away. I have tried all sorts of lotions and creams, from the stores, and even the cocoa butter secret while you are pregnant. Nothing has worked. I still got them while carrying each child. I was eager to give this a shot, something I have not tried before.

In the picture I provided, I wanted to demonstrate how thick this cream is. It has a light scent of citrus, and leaves your skin feeling soft and cool. Suggested use is 2 times a day for at least 3 weeks. I used the cream on my right side of my abdomen only for purposed of seeing how effective this product is. I am very surprised! I had equal amounts of stretch marks on both sides.
I have definitely seen a difference in clearing of these stretch marks, and I know I am not the only person who hates that irritating itch associated with the dryness of stretchmarks Not to mention the discoloration. The only thing I really see is a shiny glare where you can tell the skin was at some point compromised. Overall, I LOVE THIS PRODUCT! I would and will definitely recommend this product to friends and family. I intend on purchasing more as my weight loss journey continues.

**Disclosure: I received the product mentioned below for free using Tomoson.com. However, all of the opinions expressed are my own. [2.0/5] I'll stick to the coconut oil Ive tryed many products to try and fade my marks sadly this product turned out just like the rest...used the whole bottle and didn't see a single difference. Didn't care for the smell but was an ok moisturizer. [1.0/5] One Star Regular lotion that smells like orange. [5.0/5] Awesome Cream! I bougth this for my sister and I can't tell you how much she like it. Its a great cream and completly recommended.

response:
Luxy Beauty Stretch Mark Cream reviews. Many people like, some not.

GOOD: Most reviewers say cream thick, absorb fast, moisturize well. Smell nice, citrus minty. No harsh chemicals, good sensitive skin. Many see stretch marks lighter, smoother after few weeks. Work best on small thin marks. One mom use on one side belly only, see clear difference. Plus size woman see good results arms bust, stomach marks more stubborn. Ingredients include shea butter, cocoa butter, mango butter, jojoba oil, rose hip oil, aloe, olive oil. No greasy feeling. Reasonably priced. Most recommend product.

BAD: Two reviewers not like. One say no difference, just ok moisturizer. One say just regular lotion smell orange.

OVERALL: Most give 4-5 stars. Work better small marks than big old ones. Need use regularly, maybe combine with derma roller for best results. Many reviewers receive product free for honest review.
